failure_asset.hypothesis_tested: fold-local train-only temporal-stability dispersion-aware analog memory with US100 M5 schedule replay
failure_asset.next_boundary: next C0005 work must change a meaningful analog model, feature, label, calibration, or trade-shape surface; do not retry R0003 by only nudging neighbor count, inner-neighbor count, stability lift, adverse-rate threshold, inner-outer gap, analog distance, daily max entries, stop, target, hold, or session thresholds
failure_asset.reason_not_candidate: fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence completed with 9 losing folds, 0 profitable folds, negative total tick net PnL, and negative proxy plus MT5 tick profitability despite target-range entry frequency

supporting_lessons.summary: Closed-bar schedule replay parity passed, while tick execution worsened total net PnL by 3.00 versus logic and changed total trade count by -12; tick execution remains the economic surface.
Temporal-stability analog memory achieved 7.634483 entries per active day but lost all 9 fold-isolated MT5 tick folds.

hypothesis_variant.summary: test whether fold-local temporal-stability and dispersion-aware analog memory can filter unstable nearest-neighbor edges that defeated R0001 mean scoring and R0002 favorable-minus-adverse contrast scoring
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: third C0005 true variant; changes model family, feature representation, label shape, score stability calibration, and trade-logic interpretation to recency-weighted inner-vs-outer neighborhood agreement and dispersion-aware analog scoring; not a neighbor-count, analog-distance, lift, adverse-rate, daily-count, stop, target, hold, session, or retry nudge

notes: closed-bar MT5 mode is required for proxy-vs-EA logic parity
tick-mode MT5 is required for execution KPI management
fold-isolated MT5 tick and execution divergence are required before closeout
weak proxy evidence cannot skip MT5 validation
proxy must fit temporal-stability analog memory only inside each rolling train window
proxy result cannot decide whether MT5 validation is attempted
proxy must report stability diagnostics without creating selected claims
mechanical parity must compare scheduled entries, directions, exits, exit reasons, and position lifecycle behavior
tick-vs-closed-bar differences are execution divergence, not automatic logic failure
repair mechanical parity before any hypothesis judgment when mismatch is found

feature.summary: continuous directional momentum, reversal, trend-consistency, range-regime, range-position, wick/body pressure, prior directional drawdown, session-cycle, and spread-pressure features; no feature set is selected

label.summary: directional path-stability risk-adjusted excursion label rewarding stable favorable path alignment and penalizing adverse excursion inside train folds; no label is selected

model.summary: fold-local temporal-stability and dispersion-aware analog memory using train-only standardized feature vectors, recency-weighted neighbor labels, inner-vs-outer neighborhood agreement, label dispersion penalty, and adverse-rate veto; no model family is selected

trade_logic.summary: fixed-lot discovery schedule selects highest temporal-stability analog scores per active day with spacing and schedule replay for MT5 validation
